title: begonia rotundifolia
intro: Begonia rotundifolia, also known as Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. In traditional herbal preparations, Begonia rotundifolia is often used in teas, infusions, or poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
